title: ranunculus aconitifolius var. dealbatus
intro: Ranunculus aconitifolius var. dealbatus is a plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) and is a variant of the Ranunculus aconitifolius. It is also known as the white-stemmed buttercup or dealbatus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which have been used to treat various health issues including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems.
